frame_eqs_str: a['ddoe1']=((1-below(a['treb_att'], 1.4))*0.9); a['ddoe2']=((1-below(a['bass_att'], 1.4))*0.7); a['doen']=below(a['bass_att'], 1.45); a['decay']=(a['doen']+0.99); a['monitor']=a['decay']; a['q1']=a['ddoe2']; a['rot']=(a['rot']+(Math.sin(a['time'])*(a['ddoe1']+0.1))); a['wave_r']=(Math.max((Math.max(a['bass'], a['bass_att'])-1.2), 0)+0.5); a['wave_g']=(Math.max((Math.max(a['treb'], a['treb_att'])-1.2), 0)+0.5); a['wave_b']=(Math.max((Math.max(a['mid'], a['mid_att'])-1.2), 0)+0.5); a['ob_r']=a['wave_r']; a['ob_g']=a['wave_g']; a['ob_b']=a['wave_b']; a['ob_size']=((1-a['doen'])*(a['treb']*0.2));
